prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis — DFT (tier standard: B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point on user-supplied acrolein.xyz, not re-optimized. Mulliken partial charges were computed for the neutral (χ0), cationic (χ+; charge +1, mult. 2), and anionic (χ−; charge −1, mult. 2) states. SCF converged for all states, but the following warnings were reported by the integrity checks: 
- sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- common header present

Results:
- Most electrophilic atom: C (atom index 3, label 4) with Fukui plus f+ = 0.64232102 (dimensionless).
- Most nucleophilic atom: O (atom index 0, label 1) with Fukui minus f− = 0.39388616 (dimensionless).
